title: Behind the Stitch: Crafting the Purple Rose Set
excerpt: A closer look at the inspiration, materials, and techniques behind our signature Purple Rose Set.
content: The Purple Rose Set began as an experiment with texture and tone. By blending premium yarn, delicate crystal details, and traditional crochet techniques, we created a statement set that celebrates both elegance and artisanal craftsmanship. Every petal, every knot, and every finish was chosen to feel luxurious and wearable.

title: Studio Update: New Seasonal Colours and Materials
excerpt: Explore the latest colour palettes, material bundles, and design directions entering the studio this season.
content: This season we are introducing rich jewel tones and materials with elevated texture. Our new yarn selection includes hand-dyed blends, metallic yarn twists, and ultra-soft luxury fibres. These enhancements let us create pieces that feel as good as they look — lightweight, durable, and full of character.

title: How to Place a Custom Order with Beccaknotery
excerpt: A simple guide to custom orders, from choosing your style to confirming the final design details.
content: Custom orders are at the heart of what we do. To begin, select your preferred style and share your colour, size, and detail preferences via WhatsApp. We then confirm the design, prepare the materials, and craft the piece with full attention to quality. Custom creations typically take 7-14 days, depending on complexity.
